input.title: SPA fallback returns 404 after static publish
input.body: A user reports that an Angular single page app published through a Vite/static website flow loads from the base URL, but refreshing or directly visiting a nested route returns 404 instead of serving index.html. The report includes a minimal reproduction repository, exact reproduction steps, framework details, and the observed proxy/static hosting behavior.
comments: The reporter adds that this seems common for Angular deep links and may indicate either a framework fallback bug or missing documentation around static publish configuration.
